HGSS.348.0000:
If you cruise down the Cycling Road,
you will end up in Fuchsia City.
HGSS.348.0001:
Hello, hello. Would you like to hear
a trendy saying? [0200,0000]
HGSS.348.0002:
Very well...\f
The trendy thing for you to say
would be...\f
[011C,0000,0000]!\f
That’s a trendy sort of thing
to say.
HGSS.348.0003:
Oh, come on now! With an attitude
like that, you’ll fall behind the times!
HGSS.348.0004:
I hope you’ll use trendy sayings
in trendy ways.
HGSS.348.0005:
Hello, hello. Are you using
trendy sayings?
